allow:
Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch --env-filter '
OLD_EMAIL="akshay_shah@epam.com"
CORRECT_EMAIL="akshay27991@gmail.com"
if [ "$GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL" = "$OLD_EMAIL" ]
then
    export GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL="$CORRECT_EMAIL"
fi
if [ "$GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL" = "$OLD_EMAIL" ]
then
    export GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL="$CORRECT_EMAIL"
fi
' --tag-name-filter cat -- --branches --tags)

Bash(FILTER_BRANCH_SQUELCH_WARNING=1 git filter-branch -f --env-filter '
OLD_EMAIL="akshay_shah@epam.com"
CORRECT_EMAIL="akshay27991@gmail.com"
if [ "$GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL" = "$OLD_EMAIL" ]
then
    export GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL="$CORRECT_EMAIL"
fi
if [ "$GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL" = "$OLD_EMAIL" ]
then
    export GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL="$CORRECT_EMAIL"
fi
' --tag-name-filter cat -- --branches --tags)
